# GitHub Copilot Instructions — {{NAME}}

## Project
- Name: {{NAME}}
- Type: {{TYPE}}
- Stack: {{LANGUAGE}} / {{FRAMEWORK}} / {{PKG_MANAGER}}
- Tests: {{TEST_RUNNER}}
- Goal: {{GOAL}}

## Coding rules
- Solve the current task only.
- Use the smallest safe change.
- Do not refactor or reformat unrelated code.
- Do not add dependencies unless required.
- Prefer existing patterns and utilities.
- No comments that explain what the code does — only why when non-obvious.

## Docs
- `docs/ai/COMMANDS.md` — commands
- `docs/ai/CONTEXT.md` — architecture
- `docs/ai/TASK_LOG.md` — session state
